    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActionLogger
    Utility class for appending timestamped log entries to a persistent log file.
    Admin
     
    AuthService
    Provides authentication and session management for the university system.
    BachelorStudent
     
    ConcreteResearcher
     
    Course
    Represents an academic course offered by the university.
    Employee
     
    GradeObserver
     
    GradeSubject
     
    Lesson
     
    LessonType
     
    LowHIndexException
    Thrown when a researcher's h-index is too low for a requested operation.

    ManagerType
     
    Mark
     
    News
     
    NotResearcherException
     
    PaperByCitationsComparator

    PaperByPagesComparator

    ResearchProject
     
    Schedule
     
    Student
    Represents an enrolled student in the university system.

    Teacher
     
    UniversityRepository
     
    UniversitySystem
     
    User
    Abstract base class representing a user in the university system.
